# uapi_vnstat_config (Resource)

Vnstat config.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "uapi_vnstat_config" "example" {
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `database_dir` (String) uci option database_dir.
- `interface_5min_hours` (Number) uci option interface_5min_hours.
- `month_rotate` (Number) uci option month_rotate.

### Read-Only

- `etag` (String) Opaque ETag of the resource's current state, used for If-Match optimistic concurrency.
- `id` (String) Stable resource id assigned by uapi (a prefixed ULID).
- `managed` (Boolean) Whether the underlying uci section is uapi-managed.
